svg.title: PAKEmployee GPT — full system flow from browser to answer
svg.desc: Top-to-bottom flowchart showing how a user question travels from index.html through FastAPI, the ReAct agent, hybrid retrieval (ChromaDB + BM25), cross-encoder reranker, context compression, and LLM generation back to the browser as a cited answer.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the index.html frontend send a question to the API?')
sendPrompt('What does the FastAPI server do when it receives a query?')
sendPrompt('Explain the ReAct agent loop and its three tools')
sendPrompt('How does Reciprocal Rank Fusion merge vector and BM25 results?')
sendPrompt('What does ChromaDB store and how is it queried?')
sendPrompt('How does BM25 keyword search work in this system?')
sendPrompt('Why use a cross-encoder reranker instead of just embeddings?')
sendPrompt('What does context compression do and why does it improve answer quality?')
sendPrompt('How does the Gemini to Groq fallback chain work?')
sendPrompt('What Gemini model is used for generation?')
sendPrompt('Why is Groq used as a fallback provider?')
sendPrompt('What fields are in the JSON response from the API?')
sendPrompt('How does index.html render the answer and source citations?')
